metadata.description: Multi-phase parallel research pipeline for Claude Code

plugins.name: research-pipeline
plugins.description: Multi-phase parallel research pipeline — decompose topic → research aspects in parallel → synthesize → quality gate → grounded report. Includes source tiering, slop detection, git-based checkpointing, and WebSearch/Exa backends.

plugins.name: voxscribe
plugins.description: Russian-first audio/video → readable text via faster-whisper on CPU. Three modes: lecture (transcribe + paragraph stitching → .md), dialogue (transcribe + pyannote diarization + sbert punctuation → speaker turns with em-dashes), folder (list files and fan out to parallel subagents). Auto-extracts wav from video via ffmpeg, idempotent, atomic writes, no-speech guard.
